entry.title: Custom VS Code extensions and developer workflow automation
entry.summary: A paid-service offer for teams that need custom VS Code extensions, workflow automation, or maintenance/support.

entry.title: What should VS Code Exact File Preview support next?
entry.summary: A short feedback ask for VS Code and VSCodium users: what file type or workflow should Exact File Preview support next?

entry.title: VS Code Exact File Preview — v0.1.0-beta
entry.summary: Preview the exact selected file in VS Code without starting a server or guessing your framework. Supports .html, .svg, .md, .txt, .json, .xml. HTML and SVG are fully sandboxed with no script execution.

entry.title: GitHub Timeline Focus — v0.1.0-beta
entry.summary: Chrome extension that hides label, assignment, and project noise from GitHub issue and PR timelines. Comments, reviews, closed/merged, and title renames are always kept visible. Floating toggle to show everything.

entry.title: Attachment Rename Safe — v0.1.0-beta
entry.summary: Obsidian plugin that renames all attachments referenced in the current note with a live preview before any change is applied. Supports wikilinks and Markdown links. Stores a local undo log.

entry.title: Lost Ark Raid Bot — Live
entry.summary: Discord bot for Lost Ark raid scheduling, roster management, and team coordination. Live and in active use.
